textPlain: Here is another take on visualizing transformers from Georgia Tech researchers: https://poloclub.github.io/transformer-explainer/The Illustrated Transformer: https://jalammar.github.io/illustrated-transformer/Sebastian Raschka, PhD has a post on the architectures: https://magazine.sebastianraschka.com/p/from-gpt-2-to-gpt-os...This HN comment has numerous resources: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=35712334
Wow, this is tremendously intricate and very impressive! What an awesome way to visualize the process.
